Vendored browser assets for the web UI.

- marked 18.0.3: https://www.npmjs.com/package/marked, MIT license
- DOMPurify 3.4.0: https://www.npmjs.com/package/dompurify, MPL-2.0 or Apache-2.0 license
- highlight.js CDN assets 11.11.1: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@highlightjs/cdn-assets, BSD-3-Clause license

These files are served from /assets/vendor and included in the web UI asset hash.
